remote_resources.notes: No remote resource is inferred by this local profiler. Ask the user whether SSH, cluster, cloud, or batch resources are available.

recommended_interaction: Tell the user what local scale appears feasible.
Ask whether they have remote SSH, cluster, cloud, or batch resources.
If local resources are insufficient for high-precision reproduction, state the limitation and provide a recommended compute configuration.
Default to a local feature-level run when no remote resource is provided.
